message:
feat(atc): Air Traffic Controller — decision core, liveness, conflict, martingale, calibration, synthesis, engine

Implements 8 of 16 ATC tracks (3170 lines, 72 tests):

- Track 1: DecisionCore<S,A> — generic expected-loss minimization with EWMA
  posterior updates, probability floor for underflow recovery, 3 loss matrices
- Track 4: EvidenceLedger — bounded ring buffer with DecisionBuilder pattern
- Track 2: AgentRhythm — per-agent EWMA rhythm tracker with program-type
  priors, adaptive suspicion thresholds
- Track 3: ProjectConflictGraph + Tarjan's SCC for deadlock cycle detection
- Track 11: EProcessMonitor (independent ONS per entity, correct lambda
  bounds), CusumDetector (Page's CUSUM with regime change history),
  RegretTracker (counterfactual regret with worst-action ranking)
- Track 5: CalibrationGuard — safe mode policy consuming e-process + CUSUM
  signals, configurable recovery count, operator override
- Track 8: AtcEngine — full orchestration with self-exclusion, agent
  registration, liveness evaluation, deadlock detection, safe mode blocking
- Track 7: SessionSummary — monotone accumulator with incremental rendering,
  per-agent/per-thread counters, monotonicity verification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
